title: pararrhueo #3901
definition:
1) to glide by: lest we be carried by, pass by
    1a) lest the salvation which these things heard show us how to
        obtain, slip away from us
    1b) a thing escapes me
    1c) slips my mind
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to glide by: lest we be carried by, pass by
    1a) lest the salvation which these things heard show us how to
        obtain, slip away from us
    1b) a thing escapes me
    1c) slips my mind

    NASB:  to flow by, hence slip away:
